features.name: Charge
features.text: If the goat moves at least 20 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 10 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

features.name: Sure-Footed
features.text: The goat has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone.

summary.description: The Grimebacks keep a small herd of 12 goats in a pen in the Dripfort, stolen in surface raids over the past year. The goats provide milk, meat, and bones. They are surprisingly content living underground and have grown fat on a diet of garbage and sewer mushrooms. If a goat is attacked, the rest panic, jumping the wall and scattering throughout the Dripfort - creating significant noise and chaos that could serve as an excellent distraction or a disaster.

encounters.description: Found in the goat pen (Location 7) in the Dripfort, adjacent to Rattooth's quarters.

groups.creatures: 12 goats in the pen (3 in the indoor pen, rest outside)
